base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of super_koopas — a character from 1990 super mario world. Super Koopas — cape-wearing Koopas in Sky World. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Super Koopas — cape-wearing Koopas in Sky World
